testcase.name: logingUsingInvalidEmail

testcase.name: verifyAddToCartFunctionality

failure.message: expected [Kapruka Shopping Cart] but found [Just a moment...]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Kapruka Shopping Cart] but found [Just a moment...] at com.Kapruka.ClothingMenu.verifyAddToCartFunctionality(ClothingMenu.java:80) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ... Removed 31 stack frames
